executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned runtime and verifier gates are green. Whole-stack certification is blocked by external marketing outcome evidence (fail-closed independent verification).
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Marketing must produce fresh measurable primary-repo adoption evidence and pass independent verification before whole-stack green can be declared.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Marketing independent verification fails closed — outcome evidence still missing
findings.mechanism: Marketing verification returns 'fail'. Blockers: stale runner bundle, flat primary-repo adoption, measurement hold active, missing consolidated execution board, reddit channel blocked, workflow audit still reporting needs-repair.
findings.root_cause: No fresh measurable Codeberg-primary adoption movement has been produced.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce measurable adoption evidence, rerun full marketing bundle, and pass independent verification before calling whole-stack green.

findings.title: Live Gateway cron topology is clean — 26 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 errors
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection confirms zero disabled jobs, zero live errors, all 26 jobs enabled. Persisted disabled entries (17 of 43) are historical artifacts only.
findings.root_cause: Runtime topology remains healthy and coherent.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue direct cron inspection as source of truth on each watchdog run.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path passes independent verification
findings.mechanism: Architecture independent verification returns qualified_pass. Loop integrity checks green for both ralph-docs-watchdog and agent-architecture-watchdog. Architecture-owned open incidents are all resolved.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are functioning correctly. Remaining red is external.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain independent verification after each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs are historical only — zero live runtime impact
findings.mechanism: 17 disabled jobs persist in jobs.json history but none appear in the live Gateway topology. Live view is 26/26/0/0.
findings.root_cause: Disabled entries persist after cleanup; no runtime effect.
findings.recommended_fix: No action needed. Continue separating persisted history from live topology in audits.

findings.title: All architecture-owned open incidents are resolved; marketing incidents remain blocked_external
findings.mechanism: The open incidents registry shows agent_architecture_verifier, agent_architecture_verifier_runtime, agent_architecture_json all resolved. Marketing incidents (marketing_independent_verification and sub-blockers) are blocked_external with repeat counts in hundreds.
findings.root_cause: Architecture incident resolution is working. Marketing owner loop has not cleared its external blockers.
findings.recommended_fix: No architecture action needed. Marketing owner loop carries the remaining escalation.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Marketing owner loop: produce fresh measurable adoption evidence and pass independent verification
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: This is the single gate between architecture-green and whole-stack-green.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Once marketing passes independent verification, whole-stack certification becomes possible.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Maintain live cron inspection as the canonical topology source of truth
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live view is clean (26/26/0/0). Persisted history must not leak into runtime claims.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Prevents stale topology allegations in future audit reports.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Fresh live inspection: 26 jobs, 26 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 errors. Persisted shows 43 total with 17 disabled (historical).
Verified all architecture-owned incidents are resolved. Marketing incidents remain blocked_external as expected.
Confirmed the only remaining red is external marketing outcome evidence. No architecture-owned blockers exist.

independent_verification.summary: Architecture verifier passes independent verification (qualified_pass, 2026-06-02T17:14:59). Live loop topology, ownership checks, and shared market-intelligence consumption all verify green. Marketing remains fail-closed on external outcome evidence.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent verification pass backed by measurable primary-repo adoption movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing independent verification is fail — no measurable primary-repo adoption evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: All architecture-owned gates are green. The sole remaining blocker is external: marketing owner loop must produce fresh adoption outcome evidence and pass its independent verification.

notes: Architecture green means the architecture-owned verifier path, runtime topology, and incident resolution are coherent. It does not mean the whole stack is green.
Live Gateway shows 26 jobs, all enabled, 0 disabled, 0 errors. Persisted disabled jobs (17) are historical only.
Architecture-owned open incidents are all resolved. Marketing incidents remain blocked_external.
The single remaining blocker is external marketing outcome evidence.
No live errors or runtime drift detected in this watchdog run.
